description: Database schema containing employee profiles, current project requirements, and historical project performance metrics for AI-driven task assignment.

tables.neurax_employees_dataset: Contains employee details including their roles, technical skills, years of experience, and current workload percentages.
tables.neurax_projects_dataset: Lists active and upcoming projects, including their objectives, required technical skills, deadlines in days, and priority levels.
tables.neurax_project_history_dataset: Logs historical project execution data, tracking team sizes, tools utilized, completion times, and overall success scores.
